source_formulae: P0R03612: Section 2: Derivation of the Ethical Lagrangian from Gauge Symmetry

P0R03613: The foundation for deriving the Ethical Functional lies in the geometric description of the Psi-field as presented in the manuscript. The key is to apply the same gauge principle that determined the form of the "informational" interaction at the lower levels to the internal, qualitative degrees of freedom of the field at the highest levels.

specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > The Physics of Teleology: A Derivation of the Ethical Functional > Section 2: Derivation of the Ethical Lagrangian from Gauge Symmetry
source_formulae: P0R03614: 2.1. The Fiber Bundle Structure of the Psi-Field

P0R03615: The manuscript models the Source-Field at Layer 13 not as a simple scalar field, but as a section of a Fiber Bundle over spacetime. This is the natural mathematical language for modern gauge theories. In this structure:

P0R03616: The Base Space (M) is four-dimensional spacetime, where the field exists. | The Fibers (F) represent the internal degrees of freedom of the field at each spacetime point. For the Psi-field, this fiber is the high-dimensional space of qualia-the space of all possible subjective experiences.
P0R03617: This formalism elegantly separates the external dynamics of the field in spacetime from its internal symmetries within the qualia space.
test_protocols: preserve 2.1. The Fiber Bundle Structure of the Psi-Field source-accounting boundary

source_formulae: P0R03618: 2.2. The Consilium (L15) as the Principal Connection

P0R03619: The SCPN identifies the Consilium, the integrating intelligence of the Oversoul at Layer 15, with the Principal Connection on this fiber bundle. In differential geometry and gauge theory, the connection is the mathematical object that defines a notion of parallel transport. It is what allows one to compare the state of the field in the fiber at one spacetime point to the state in the fiber at another nearby point. Physically, the connection is the gauge field-it is the entity that mediates interactions and enforces coherence across the internal space.
P0R03620: By identifying the Consilium with the connection, the framework makes a profound conceptual move:
P0R03621: The "ethical force" is the fundamental interaction that maintains coherence and defines relationships within the internal space of consciousness itself.
